---
title: Entra Customer Lockbox Approver
description: Entra Customer Lockbox Approver
ms.service: entra-id
ms.subservice: role-based-access-control
ms.topic: include
ms.date: 06/30/2026
author: FaithOmbongi
ms.author: ombongifaith
---

Users with this role can approve Customer Lockbox requests for accessing customer data in Microsoft Entra ID. This role grants the ability to review and approve or deny lockbox requests submitted by Microsoft support engineers who need temporary access to tenant data for troubleshooting purposes.

<!-- autogenerated content starts here -->

> [!div class="mx-tableFixed"]
> | Actions | Description |
> | --- | --- |
> | microsoft.directory/lockbox/requests/update | Update Customer Lockbox requests for Microsoft Entra resources |
